Database Concepts.question: Which of the following is advantage of database approach over file-based approach?
options: B. Separation and isolation of data

Database Concepts.question: A person who is responsible for the physical realization of the database, including physical database design and implementation, security and integrity control, maintenance of the operational system, and ensuring satisfactory performance of the applications for users is called as_____________.
In the three-tier architecture, the intermediate layer between database and client servers is classified as

Database Design.question: A database architecture level which describes what data is stored in the database and the relationships among the data is known as ______________.
Which one of the following is an example of the object-based logical model?
A language that allows the DBA or user to describe and name the entities, attributes, and relationships required for the application, together with any associated integrity and security constraints.
A language that allows the user to tell the system what data is needed and exactly how to retrieve the data.
Which statement supports the concept behind network data model?
options: A. Collections of records, and relationships are represented by sets.
B. Data and relationships are represented as tables, each of which has a number of columns with a unique name.
C. Collection of concepts for describing and manipulating data, relationships between data, and constraints on the data in an organization.
D. A type of data model which is based on the concept of mathematical relations.
Database Design.answer: A. Collections of records, and relationships are represented by sets.

Normalization.question: A database design technique for producing a set of relations with desirable properties, given the data requirements of an enterprise is called ___________.
If A and B are attributes of relation R, B is functionally dependent on A (denoted A → B), if each value of A is associated with exactly one value of B. This statement best described by _______.

Database Systems.question: Deadlocks are possible only when one of the transactions wants to obtain a(n) ____ lock on a data item.

If several concurrent transactions are executed over the same data set and the second transaction updates the database before the first transaction is finished, the ____ property is violated and the database is no longer consistent.
A DBMS uses a transaction ____ to keep track of all transactions that update the database
The Oracle RDBMS uses the ____ statement to declare a new transaction start and its properties.
When a program is abnormally terminated, the equivalent of a ____ command occurs.
When the recovery procedure uses ____, the database is immediately updated by transaction operations during the transaction's execution, even before the transaction reaches its commit point.
